pending_owner.title: Workspace setup in progress
pending_owner.description: Your account is linked to a company that is still being configured. Ask the owner to finish onboarding.

progress.title: Progress
progress.note: Keep this info up to date to unlock all dashboard features.

account.owner_notice: This account will become the company owner.
account.have_account: Already have an account? Sign in

company.name: Company name
company.address_error_key: Geoapify configuration missing. Check application configuration.
company.address_error_failed: Search failed. Check the Geoapify key or use manual entry.

sector.hint: If your sector is not listed, choose Other to create it.
sector.products_note: The Sales module will be enabled to sell your products through the platform.
sector.services_note: Service categories will be created automatically, including for a custom sector.

team.title: Invite the team (optional)
team.subtitle: Add members now or later.
team.size_hint: Tell us how many people will use the platform.
team.size_hint_solo: Stay at 1 for a solo workspace. Increase this only if you plan to move to a team setup.
team.solo_subtitle: You are starting alone. Team invitations stay off until you move to a team plan.
team.name: Name

plan.title: Choose your plan
plan.subtitle: 1 month trial, then automatic billing based on your plan. Card required.
plan.downgrade_note: You can change plans during the trial.

solo.title: Solo plans
solo.description: We are showing solo plans because your workspace is owner-only today. You can move to Team later without rebuilding your setup.

team.title: Team plans
team.description: We are showing team plans because your workspace includes {count} people. Team adds collaboration, permissions, and higher limits.

solo_essential.description: Core plan for solo operators who need a clear operating foundation.
features: Requests, quotes, invoices, jobs, and tasks
Simple solo execution without advanced modules

solo_pro.description: Growth plan for solo operators who need more structure and execution capacity.
features: More capacity for jobs and tasks
Clearer solo structure without team logic

solo_growth.description: Scale plan for solo operators who want automation and premium headroom.
features: Bookings and scheduling in limited solo mode
Assistant, plan scan, campaigns, and loyalty

starter.description: Core team plan for shared execution and collaboration.
features: Shared foundation for requests, quotes, jobs, and invoices
Assistant and plan scan in limited mode

growth.description: Growth team plan for permissions, automation, and higher operating volume.

scale.description: Scale team plan for advanced operations, AI, and premium support.
features: Premium capacity, AI, and stronger scan limits

security.title: Choose your 2FA method
security.subtitle: Add an extra layer of protection for the owner account.
security.method_email_hint: We'll send a one-time code to {email}.
security.change_later: You can change this later in Security settings.
